OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents an individual item ordered at Mirinha's Restaurant.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created the order item.

itemName.description: The name of the item ordered.

itemGroup.description: The group the item belongs to (Fiados salão, Fiados rua, Vendas rua, Vendas salão).

quantity.description: The quantity of the item ordered. Defaults to 1 if not specified.

orderDateTime.description: The date and time the item was ordered.

FavoriteClient.title: FavoriteClient
FavoriteClient.description: Represents a favorite client with a saved command.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created the favorite.

name.description: The name of the favorite client.

command.description: The saved command for the client's usual order.

definition.description: Stores all order items for the application. Access is controlled via a 'userId' field on each document.

params.name: orderItemId
params.description: The unique identifier of the order item.

definition.description: Stores all favorite clients. Access is controlled via a 'userId' field on each document.

params.name: clientId
params.description: The unique identifier of the favorite client.
